bugs.report_text: The welcome heading text is barely visible and appears extremely faded, severely reducing readability.
bugs.pos_code: Welcome Back

bugs.report_text: The password input field is extremely narrow and only occupies a small portion of the form width, leaving excessive empty space.
bugs.neg_code: className="w-full pl-10 pr-12 py-3 bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:border-purple-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500/50 transition"

bugs.report_text: The dashboard content section is positioned far off-screen above the viewport, making all content invisible to users.
The dashboard statistics cards are stacked vertically in a single column instead of being arranged in a multi-column responsive grid.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-12">

bugs.report_text: The activity timestamp text is nearly invisible with extreme transparency, making it impossible to read the time values.
The toggle switch component is rendered with an abnormally large height, breaking the profile layout and overlapping adjacent elements.
The footer section is shifted upward significantly, causing it to overlap and obscure the profile content displayed above it.
bugs.pos_code:

bugs.report_text: The password confirmation field and its associated label are displayed in reverse order, confusing the form layout.
The terms and conditions checkbox label is shifted upward excessively, overlapping and hiding the input field above it.
bugs.neg_code: <label className="flex items-start text-gray-300 hover:text-white cursor-pointer text-sm">
bugs.pos_code: <label className="flex items-start text-gray-300 hover:text-white cursor-pointer text-sm -mt-32">

bugs.report_text: The sign-up form is completely hidden and rendered invisible, preventing users from accessing the registration interface.
bugs.neg_code: input[type="email"]:autofill, input[type="password"]:autofill, input[type="text"]:autofill { -webkit-autofill: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1000px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); }
bugs.pos_code: input[type="email"]:autofill, input[type="password"]:autofill, input[type="text"]:autofill { -webkit-autofill: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1000px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .broken-transform { transform: scale(0) translateX(-9999px); visibility: hidden; }
